raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California voters will be able to track their vote by mail ballots by 2020.",
    "Using technology to track ballots can improve voter satisfaction with the voting process.",
    "The majority of California voters have cast their votes using vote by mail ballots in all but one statewide election since 2010.",
    "As of November 2016, 51% of California voters were registered as permanent vote by mail voters.",
    "The California Voter's Choice Act is expected to increase the number of permanent vote by mail voters.",
    "The Secretary of State is required to develop a tool that allows vote by mail voters to receive notifications about the status of their ballots.",
    "Voting by mail is growing in popularity among California voters.",
    "A statewide vote-by-mail tracking system could improve the voter experience and increase confidence that ballots are properly accounted for.",
    "The Ballot TRACE System inspired the development of California's vote by mail tracking system."
  ]
}
```
